description: The 33rd Al-Mahdi Division is an IRGC ground forces combat division that fought during the [Iran–Iraq War](/events/iran-iraq-war). It was commanded by [Mohammad Jafar Asadi](/people/mohammad-jafar-asadi) during major operations of that conflict. The division is part of the IRGC Ground Forces (Niru-ye Zamini-ye Sepah) and represents one of the key IRGC formation units that gave the corps its battlefield experience.
editorial_notes: IRGC formation unit; commanded by Mohammad Jafar Asadi (in DB) during Iran-Iraq War.
